description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that runs on every push and pull request to the master branch, as well as on a scheduled basis every Thursday at 9:38 PM. In a single ubuntu-latest job with read permissions for actions and contents, and write permission for security events, check out the repository, initialize CodeQL for C++ analysis, install qt6-base-dev and libqt6svg6-dev dependencies, perform an autobuild, and run a CodeQL analysis.
